title: Security and Data Governance
summary: RBAC, encryption, audit logging and data ownership.

blocks.heading: Security controls
bullets: Regular backups and disaster recovery planning
Future hardware: device identity, secure boot, firmware signing

blocks.heading: Multi-tenancy
blocks.content: Default: shared database with strict tenant isolation via tenant_id. Cross-tenant analytics disabled unless explicitly contracted and anonymized.

blocks.heading: Data governance
bullets: Customers own raw operational data unless contracts define otherwise
Derived features and model outputs require clear contractual terms
Provider-originated data usage complies with partner agreements
All ingestion, transformation and access actions are auditable
